title: justicia panamensis
intro: Justicia panamensis, also known as the Panama Justicia or Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia panamensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Justicia panamensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
